sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَخْطُو قَدَمَاكَ دَاخِلَ السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، تَسْتَقْبِلُكَ رَوَائِحُ التَّوَابِلِ الشَّرْقِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَمْلَأُ الْأَزِقَّةَ الضَّيِّقَةَ بِعَبَقِ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Kada zakoračite u narodnu pijacu, dočekaju vas mirisi orijentalnih začina koji uske uličice ispunjavaju mirisom historije.
sentences.translationEn: When you step inside the traditional market, you are greeted by the smells of oriental spices that fill the narrow alleys with the fragrance of history.

sentences.arabic: تَتَرَاصُّ أَكْيَاسُ الْقِرْفَةِ وَالْكَمُّونِ وَالسُّمَّاقِ بِأَلْوَانِهَا الزَّاهِيَةِ، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُ الْمَشْهَدَ لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً تَسُرُّ النَّاظِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Vreće cimeta, kumina i sumaka poredane su u svojim jarkim bojama, čineći prizor umjetničkom slikom koja raduje posmatrače.
sentences.translationEn: Sacks of cinnamon, cumin, and sumac are lined up in their bright colors, making the scene an artistic painting that delights onlookers.

sentences.arabic: يَتَفَاوَضُ الزُّبُونَاتُ وَالزُّبَائِنُ مَعَ التُّجَّارِ بِأُسْلُوبٍ لَبِقٍ، حَيْثُ تُعَدُّ عَمَلِيَّةُ الْمُسَاوَمَةِ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنَ التَّجْرِبَةِ الشَّرَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupci pregovaraju s trgovcima na ljubazan način, jer se proces cjenkanja smatra sastavnim dijelom iskustva kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: Customers negotiate with merchants in a polite manner, as the process of bargaining is considered an integral part of the shopping experience.

sentences.arabic: لَا يُمْكِنُكَ مُغَادَرَةُ السُّوقِ دُونَ تَذَوُّقِ بَعْضِ الْحَلْوِيَّاتِ الدِّمَشْقِيَّةِ أَوْ شِرَاءِ زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ الْبِكْرِ الْمُسْتَخْرَجِ حَدِيثًا.
sentences.translation: Ne možete napustiti pijacu a da ne probate neke damaščanske poslastice ili kupite svježe cijeđeno ekstra djevičansko maslinovo ulje.
sentences.translationEn: You cannot leave the market without tasting some Damascene sweets or buying freshly extracted extra virgin olive oil.

sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ هَذِهِ الْأَسْوَاقُ نَبْضَ الْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ تَمْتَزِجُ فِيهَا الْأَصَالَةُ بِالْحَدَاثَةِ فِي تَنَاغُمٍ فَرِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove pijace predstavljaju puls svakodnevnog života, gdje se originalnost miješa sa modernizmom u jedinstvenoj harmoniji.
sentences.translationEn: These markets represent the pulse of daily life, where authenticity blends with modernity in a unique harmony.
